summary: Admin Dashboard feature testing completed successfully. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all required features including stats grid, subscription breakdown, user table with search/filter/pagination, CSV export button, and proper admin access control.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/stats - returns 401 without token (auth required)
GET /api/admin/users - returns 401 without token (auth required)
GET /api/admin/users/export - returns 401 without token (auth required)
DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} - returns 401 without token (auth required)
GET /api/admin/stats - returns 403 for non-admin user
GET /api/admin/users - returns 403 for non-admin user
GET /api/admin/users/export - returns 403 for non-admin user
DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} - returns 403 for non-admin user
GET /api/admin/stats - returns correct fields (total_users, total_books, books_this_month, subscription_distribution, no_plan_users, estimated_monthly_revenue)
GET /api/admin/users - returns paginated list with correct user fields (user_id, name, email, subscription, books_count, created_at, is_admin)
GET /api/admin/users?search=test - filters users by name/email
GET /api/admin/users?plan=sans_abonnement - filters users without subscription (excludes admin)
GET /api/admin/users - pagination works correctly
GET /api/admin/users/export - returns CSV with correct headers (Nom, Email, Abonnement, etc.)
GET /api/admin/users/export?search=glas - applies search filter to export
DELETE /api/admin/users/{user_id} - deletes non-admin user and their books successfully
DELETE /api/admin/users/{admin_id} - returns 400 error for admin deletion attempt
DELETE /api/admin/users/{fake_id} - returns 404 for nonexistent user
UI: Admin login successful
UI: /admin page shows stats grid with 4 cards (Utilisateurs, Livres créés, Sans abonnement, Revenus estimés)
UI: /admin page shows subscription distribution breakdown
UI: /admin page shows user table with correct columns
UI: Search input filters users by name/email
UI: Plan filter dropdown filters users by subscription type
UI: Export CSV button present and functional
UI: Admin user row shows violet 'Admin' badge
UI: Admin user row does NOT have delete button
UI: Non-admin user rows have delete buttons
UI: Navbar dropdown shows 'Administration' link with Shield icon for admin user
UI: Non-admin user redirected from /admin to home page (/)
seed_data_creation: Created test users with 'TEST_admin_' prefix during testing, cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard feature fully tested and working. Route /admin accessible only to admin user (glaseditionslab@gmail.com). Features verified: stats grid (4 cards), subscription distribution breakdown, paginated user table with search/filter, CSV export, user deletion (non-admin only). Admin link appears in navbar dropdown menu for admin users only. Non-admin users are correctly redirected from /admin to home page.

admin_users_export.format: CSV with semicolon delimiter, UTF-8-BOM encoding
